nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 罗纹鸭
nodes.summary: 罗纹鸭（Falcated duck，学名 Mareca falcata），分类上属于雁形目，并归入鸭科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括猎捕压力、栖息地破坏、湿地排水。

nodes.name: 鸭科
nodes.summary: 鸭科（Anatidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联162种鸟类，如中华秋沙鸭、白背鸭、细斑树鸭等162种鸟类。

nodes.name: 湿地排水
nodes.summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。

nodes.name: 雁形目
nodes.summary: 雁形目（Anseriformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联166种鸟类，如中华秋沙鸭、角叫鴨、黑颈冠叫鸭等166种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: A primary threat to the falcated duck is hunting, as people want them for food and their feathers

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Their habitat loss is also caused by the drainage of the wetlands. Although the overall population of the falcated duck is larger than once believed and is no longer classified as an endangered species, it is still considered "near threatened" on the IUCN's (or the International Union for the Conservation of Nature's) Animal Red List.{{cite web |last1=Butchart |first1=S

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Their habitat loss is also caused by the drainage of the wetlands. Although the overall population of the falcated duck is larger than once believed and is no longer classified as an endangered species, it is still considered "near threatened" on the IUCN's (or the International Union for the Conservation of Nature's) Animal Red List.{{cite web |last1=Butchart |first1=S

links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: 罗纹鸭 属于目 雁形目。
